_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Liveaboard.com
listings.description: Liveaboard.com is an online marketplace and booking platform specializing in scuba diving liveaboard trips, aggregating vessel availability and itineraries across major dive destinations worldwide. It lets divers compare and book multi-day dive boat trips directly.

listings.name: CruiseDirect
listings.description: CruiseDirect is an online cruise booking agency aggregating sailings from major cruise lines, allowing consumers to compare cabins, itineraries, and onboard credit deals across operators. It operates as a consumer-facing cruise OTA in North America.

listings.name: Widgety
listings.description: Widgety provides booking and distribution technology for the small ship cruise and expedition cruise sector, powering booking widgets and reservation systems for cruise lines and specialist agents. It focuses on niche and boutique cruise operators.
usps: White-label widgets for cruise line websites
Tailored to small ship operator needs

listings.name: Traveltek
listings.description: Traveltek provides booking and content technology specifically for the cruise industry, offering cruise search, booking engines, and CRM tools used by travel agencies, tour operators, and cruise lines. Its iSell and iVector platforms are widely used cruise distribution tools.

listings.name: Odysseus Solutions
listings.description: Odysseus Solutions provides distribution and reservation technology for the cruise and tour industries, connecting cruise lines and tour operators to travel agencies via GDS-like connectivity. It focuses on standardizing cruise content for traditional agency booking tools.
usps: Bridges cruise content into traditional agency workflows
Long operating history in cruise distribution

listings.name: Revelex
listings.description: Revelex provides booking engine technology for cruise, hotel, and vacation package sellers, powering online travel agencies and tour operators with multi-supplier search and booking capability. Its cruise booking module aggregates sailings across major cruise lines.

listings.name: Vacation.com Cruise Concierge
listings.description: Vacation.com, part of Internova Travel Group, provides its network of affiliated travel agents with cruise booking tools and consortia rates through its Cruise Concierge program, aggregating cruise line offers and exclusive perks for member agencies.
usps: Backed by large Internova agency network

listings.name: CruiseCompete
listings.description: CruiseCompete is an online marketplace that lets consumers request quotes from multiple competing travel agencies for the same cruise itinerary, aggregating agency responses to help travelers find the best cruise deal. It connects cruisers with independent cruise specialist agents.
usps: Connects travelers with vetted cruise specialists

listings.name: iVvy Venue & Cruise Booking
listings.description: iVvy provides cloud booking and venue management technology that extends to cruise and event-space bookings, allowing operators to manage group inquiries, availability, and online booking for cruise charters and meeting spaces. It serves hospitality and MICE-focused cruise operators.

listings.name: Dive The World
listings.description: Dive The World is an online booking agency specializing in scuba diving liveaboards and dive resorts across Southeast Asia, aggregating vessel and resort availability for divers seeking curated trip recommendations. It provides destination expertise alongside direct booking.
usps: Deep Southeast Asia dive destination expertise

listings.name: CruiseMapper Booking Tools
listings.description: CruiseMapper provides cruise tracking, itinerary, and ship information services along with affiliate booking tools that aggregate cruise line offers for travelers researching sailings. It is widely used as a research companion before booking through partner agencies.
usps: Rich ship tracking and itinerary database
Wide affiliate network to cruise line booking

listings.name: Worldwide Dive and Sail
listings.description: Worldwide Dive and Sail is a specialist liveaboard booking agency aggregating dive boat availability across global destinations including Indonesia, the Red Sea, and the Maldives, providing curated itineraries for scuba diving travelers. It operates as both an agency and part-owner of select vessels.
usps: Combines agency booking with vessel ownership stakes
products: Worldwide Dive and Sail Booking Platform

listings.name: Cruise Hive Deals Network
listings.description: Cruise Hive operates a cruise news and deals aggregation platform, surfacing discounted sailings and last-minute cruise offers from multiple cruise lines and booking partners for consumers. It functions as an affiliate-driven cruise deal discovery site.
usps: Trusted cruise news source doubling as deal aggregator

listings.name: Blue O Two
listings.description: Blue O Two is a liveaboard dive operator and booking agency offering its own fleet of liveaboard vessels across the Red Sea, Maldives, and Caribbean, alongside third-party liveaboard aggregation for divers booking direct. It combines operator and aggregator roles.
usps: Strong Red Sea and Maldives specialization

listings.name: Master Liveaboards
listings.description: Master Liveaboards operates and books its own fleet of dive liveaboard vessels across Indonesia, the Maldives, and other Indo-Pacific destinations, combining direct fleet ownership with an online booking platform for scuba diving travelers.
usps: Operates its own multi-vessel liveaboard fleet
